summary: Retest of 3 fixes from iteration_1: (1) level_from_xp formula, (2) achievements fallback, (3) Awakening awaits onInitiated. All 15 pytest backend tests pass (100%). End-to-end UI flow verified: Awakening->Dashboard with no flash back. After completing one 100-XP daily quest, stats returns level=2, xp_into_level=0, xp_needed_for_next=300 exactly as required. Achievements page shows 10 cards (>=6). XP bar shows 20/300 XP (no negatives). All three previously reported bugs are FIXED.

minor.issue: Streak logic with `continue` in days_back==0 branch is hard to read; not currently buggy in tested cases but fragile. Refactor to a daily-set lookup recommended (carry-over from iter 1).

critical_code_review_comments: level_from_xp now correct: level N requires (N-1)^2*100 cumulative XP. Verified 100 XP -> level=2 xp_into_level=0 xp_needed=300.
Achievements fallback (6 default) inserted when Claude returns empty/missing achievements; >=6 achievements always present after initiate.
Awakening.handleNext now `await onInitiated()` before navigate('/'). UI test confirmed no /awakening flash on full page load post-activation.
Optional: refactor compute_stats streak loop for clarity (non-blocking).
Optional: add unit tests for level_from_xp / xp_for_level boundary values (0, 99, 100, 399, 400) to lock in formula.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (awakening, dashboard, quest complete, achievements all working)

seed_data_creation: Tests POST /api/reset; profile name TEST_Hunter / TEST_UIHunter prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration_1 bugs fixed and verified. Backend AI awakening with Claude Sonnet 4.5 stable (~15-30s). Use POST /api/reset to clean state. Daily quest XP rewards from Claude vary (80/100/150/200) - tests should not assume fixed value. Achievements count typically 6-10.
rca of the issue: Iter 1 RCA confirmed and fixed in server.py: level_from_xp now uses `while (lvl*lvl*100) <= total_xp: lvl+=1` paired with xp_for_level = (level-1)^2*100, giving consistent thresholds: L1=0, L2=100, L3=400, L4=900. Achievements fallback inserts 6 default Solo-Leveling-style achievements when AI returns none. Awakening.jsx awaits onInitiated() (which calls api.profile() refresh in App.js) before navigate('/') so App's `initiated` state is true before route evaluation, preventing redirect-to-/awakening flash.
